chunks.title: Contrasts on Justice and Integrity
chunks.reason: A series of parallel proverbs contrasting the fate of the righteous and wicked regarding justice.

chunks.title: Deliverance and Community Impact
chunks.reason: Continues the catalog of proverbs focusing on how righteousness affects personal rescue and city stability.

chunks.title: Wisdom in Speech and Action
chunks.reason: A collection of sayings on discretion, counsel, guarantees, and the effects of kindness versus cruelty.

chunks.title: Wages and Desires
chunks.reason: Proverbs contrasting the deceptive wages of the wicked with the true reward of the righteous.

chunks.title: Generosity and Fruitfulness
chunks.reason: A sequence of proverbs on giving, seeking good, trusting in riches, and winning souls.

chunks.title: Final Warning
chunks.reason: A concluding rhetorical question summarizing the judgment of both the righteous and the wicked.
